dialogue_events.dialogue_text: Helium,
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "Helium," he said, "rightly boasts the most beautiful women of Barsoom, and of all her treasures the wondrous daughter of Mors Kajak, Dejah Thoris, is the most exquisite flower.

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.

review_notes: Speaker could not be resolved from the source context.

delivery_profile.delivery_note: whispered delivery with soft voice quality, neutral emotion, low volume, and slow tempo.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: Why,
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "Why," he added, "the people really worship the ground she walks upon and since her loss on that ill-starred expedition all Helium has been draped in mourning.

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: That our ruler should have attacked the disabled fleet as it was returning to Helium was but another of his awful blunders which I fear will sooner or later compel Zodanga to elevate a wiser man to his place.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: Even now, though our victorious armies are surrounding Helium, the people of Zodanga are voicing their displeasure, for the war is not a popular one, since it is not based on right or justice. Our forces took advantage of the absence of the principal fleet of Helium on their search for the princess, and so we have been able easily to reduce the city to a sorry plight. It is said she will fall within the next few passages of the further moon.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: And what, think you, may have been the fate of the princess, Dejah Thoris?
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "And what, think you, may have been the fate of the princess, Dejah Thoris?" I asked as casually as possible.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: I do not need a better reply, there is but one man upon all Barsoom who can bounce about like a rubber ball. By the mother of the further moon, John Carter, how came you here, and have you become a Darseen that you can change your color at will?

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: but I have not yet found where Dejah Thoris is imprisoned. Today I join the Zodangan navy as an air scout and I hope in this way to win the confidence of Sab Than, the prince, who is commander of this division of the navy, and thus learn the whereabouts of Dejah Thoris. I am glad that you are here, John Carter, for I know your loyalty to my princess and two of us working together should be able to accomplish much.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: My cousin has narrated the details of your wonderful achievement, which seems little short of miraculous, and if you can so well defend a cousin of the jeddak how much better could you defend the person of the jeddak himself. You are therefore appointed a padwar of The Guards and will be quartered in my palace hereafter.
